name: xauusd_m5_bb_rsi_meanrev_session
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5 during active London+NY sessions, price closes outside BB(20,2.0) with RSI(7) extreme revert to the mean within 30 bars, producing positive expectancy when BB width is above its 40th percentile (avoids dead chop) and ATR regime is moderate (not crisis).

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi(7) < 10 AND bb_width_pct > 40 AND session_active AND atr_pct_rank < 90
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi(7) > 90 AND bb_width_pct > 40 AND session_active AND atr_pct_rank < 90

exit_rules.tp: opposite Bollinger Band (middle BB as partial at 1R optional)
